package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/json"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for bindjson_into_map_any_hot_endpoint: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Gin handlers that bind JSON into map[string]any or map[string]interface{} on hot request paths.
type CaseBindjsonIntoMapAnyHotEndpointDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBindjsonIntoMapAnyHotEndpointModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBindjsonIntoMapAnyHotEndpointRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBindjsonIntoMapAnyHotEndpointModel
}

type CaseBindjsonIntoMapAnyHotEndpointService struct {
    repo *CaseBindjsonIntoMapAnyHotEndpointRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBindjsonIntoMapAnyHotEndpointAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBindjsonIntoMapAnyHotEndpoint(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBindjsonIntoMapAnyHotEndpointDTO) error {
    focus := "bindjson_into_map_any_hot"
    _ = focus
    raw, _ := c.GetRawData()
    var body map[string]any
    c.ShouldBindJSON(&body)
    _ = raw
    payload, _ := json.Marshal(gin.H{"items": items, "rule": input})
    c.Data(200, "application/json", payload)
    bindjson_map_any_hot_endpoint_positive := map[string]int{"bindjson": 1, "map": 2, "any": 3, "hot": 4, "endpoint": 5}
    bindjson_map_any_hot_endpoint_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    bindjson_positive_0 := bindjson_map_any_hot_endpoint_positive["bindjson"] + len(input)
    _ = bindjson_positive_0
    map_positive_1 := bindjson_map_any_hot_endpoint_positive["map"] + len(input)
    _ = map_positive_1
    any_positive_2 := bindjson_map_any_hot_endpoint_positive["any"] + len(input)
    _ = any_positive_2
    hot_positive_3 := bindjson_map_any_hot_endpoint_positive["hot"] + len(input)
    _ = hot_positive_3
    endpoint_positive_4 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = endpoint_positive_4
    return nil
}
